meta.report_title: AI Automation Audit Report — 2026-05-15 (The Dental Design Center)

business.name: The Dental Design Center (DDC)
business.address: 365/12–13 Soi 10, Pattaya Second Road, Banglamung, Chonburi 20150, Thailand
awards: Best Dentists in Thailand 2018 — Global Patients' Choice Awards (dentaldepartures.com)
business.invisalign_status: Sole Elite Platinum Provider in Pattaya City & Eastern Thailand

gaps: Time-zone gap risk for international patients
No new patient intake form page
Low review volume vs. claimed patient volume

friction_points.impact: International patients choose competitors with instant booking

friction_points.issue: Free Consultation Form with Unknown Response Time
friction_points.impact: Patients may wait 12–18 hours for a reply; competitor response time wins

friction_points.issue: No WhatsApp or LINE Button on Homepage
friction_points.impact: LINE is Thailand's dominant messaging platform; absence kills local conversion

friction_points.issue: Pricing Page Lacks Interactive Cost Estimator
friction_points.impact: High-value patients cannot self-qualify; staff time wasted on unqualified inquiries
Each step is a drop-off point with no automation bridge

platforms.notes: Award 2018; listed; current review volume not quantified from public data
One detailed negative review (2017) — multi-visit lab closure, advance payment dispute, rude staff complaint. No public clinic response found.
Listed in Pattaya dental category; limited review volume vs. Bangkok Hospital Pattaya
Active listing (g.page/dentaldesigncenter). Review volume estimated as below-market from public signal analysis.

reputation_audit.key_finding: Review volume is disproportionately low relative to 15-year operating history and claimed 10,000+ implant placements. No automated review request system detected.

review_pattern.opportunity: Systematic automation could drive 8–15 new Google reviews per month based on estimated patient volume
review_pattern.response_to_negatives: No public evidence of clinic responding to TripAdvisor negative review

strong: 2018 Global Patients Choice Award — Best Dentists Thailand
Dr. Kasidis: Chulalongkorn + Adelaide + Toronto + TADI + AACD + ICOI Fellow
Sole Elite Platinum Invisalign Provider Pattaya City & Eastern Thailand
iTero 3D, CBCT imaging, Class B autoclave
weak_or_missing: No patient count displayed on website
Video testimonials buried in sub-page not homepage
Facebook only 618 likes (last post estimated Oct 2024)
No live social media activity signal

follow_up_gaps: No automated post-visit review request sequence
No appointment reminder system (no SMS/WhatsApp/LINE detected)
No re-engagement for returning patients (no loyalty/recall system)
No follow-up for abandoned consultation form submissions
No post-treatment aftercare protocol communication automation

multilingual_risks.risk: After-hours English inquiry → no staff online
Mandarin email inquiry → unclear response capacity
LINE message from Thai local → no visible LINE ID
WhatsApp message → no WhatsApp button on site

automation_opportunities.name: AI Patient Receptionist (LINE + WhatsApp + Email)
automation_opportunities.description: 24/7 AI bot trained on DDC service menu, pricing, FAQs. Responds in EN/TH/ZH within 60 seconds.

automation_opportunities.name: Post-Treatment Review Request Sequence
automation_opportunities.description: Day 1 thank you + care, Day 7 check-in + Google review ask, Day 30 satisfaction + referral

automation_opportunities.name: Instant Booking Confirmation Auto-Reply
automation_opportunities.description: Automated confirmation within 2 minutes of form submission with pricing PDF and next steps

week_1: Deploy auto-reply email for consultation form (60-second response + pricing PDF)
Add WhatsApp click-to-chat to homepage and contact page
Activate LINE Official Account with greeting + FAQ menu
week_2: Deploy AI intake bot on LINE + WhatsApp
Create before/after content pipeline with consent system
Set up Google review monitoring + response library (EN/TH/ZH)

estimated_impact.disclaimer: All figures are directional estimates based on industry benchmarks. Actual figures unavailable from public data.

serviceopera_offer.package_name: DDC Growth Stack — AI Automation System
components: AI Patient Receptionist (LINE + WhatsApp + Email, EN/TH/ZH)
serviceopera_offer.entry_pitch: DDC has world-class dentists and technology. The service is there. The automation isn't. Right now, you're losing bookings every night to clinics with WhatsApp bots and instant replies. Let's fix that in 14 days.
